title: Create table
answer: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));

title: Create table with auto increment
answer: CREATE TABLE users (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));

title: Select data
answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = 1;

title: Select specific columns
answer: SELECT name, email FROM users;

title: Select with limit
answer: SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10;

title: Insert data
answer: INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('John', 'john@example.com');

title: Insert multiple rows
answer: INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('John', 'john@example.com'), ('Jane', 'jane@example.com');

title: Update data
answer: UPDATE users SET name = 'Jane' WHERE id = 1;

title: Delete data
answer: DELETE FROM users WHERE id = 1;

title: Delete all rows
answer: DELETE FROM users;

title: Join tables
answer: SELECT * FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id;

title: Left join
answer: SELECT * FROM users LEFT JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id;

title: Right join
answer: SELECT * FROM users RIGHT JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id;

title: Full outer join
answer: SELECT * FROM users FULL OUTER JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id;

title: Group by
answer: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM products GROUP BY category;

title: Having clause
answer: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM products GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 5;

title: Order by
answer: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY name ASC;

title: Order by descending
answer: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC;

title: Limit results
answer: SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10;

title: Offset for pagination
answer: SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;

title: Create index
answer: CREATE INDEX idx_name ON users(name);

title: Create unique index
answer: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_email ON users(email);

title: Drop index
answer: DROP INDEX idx_name;

title: Drop table
answer: DROP TABLE users;

title: Alter table add column
answer: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN age INT;

title: Alter table drop column
answer: ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN age;

title: Alter table rename
answer: ALTER TABLE users RENAME TO customers;

title: Subquery
answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders);

title: Correlated subquery
answer: SELECT * FROM users u WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id);

title: Union
answer: SELECT name FROM users UNION SELECT name FROM admins;

title: Union all
answer: SELECT name FROM users UNION ALL SELECT name FROM admins;

title: Transaction
answer: BEGIN TRANSACTION; INSERT INTO users...; COMMIT;

title: Rollback
answer: ROLLBACK;

title: View
answer: CREATE VIEW active_users AS SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = 1;

title: Drop view
answer: DROP VIEW active_users;

title: Count rows
answer: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users;

title: Sum values
answer: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM orders;

title: Average
answer: SELECT AVG(price) FROM products;

title: Min and Max
answer: SELECT MIN(price), MAX(price) FROM products;

title: Like operator
answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%john%';

title: Between operator
answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE age BETWEEN 25 AND 35;

title: In operator
answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);

title: Is null
answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email IS NULL;

title: Is not null
answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL;

title: Case statement
answer: CASE WHEN condition THEN result ELSE default END

title: Cast type
answer: CAST(value AS VARCHAR)

title: String concat
answer: CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name)

title: Current timestamp
answer: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
